postgres.comment: Create table for repeat variations test
Insert static data for the loop to read
postgres.query: INSERT INTO repeat_news (id, title) VALUES (10, 'Global Tech Update'), (20, 'Local Sports Events'), (30, 'Weather Forecast 2026');

postgres.comment: Check ability to get specific news inside repeat loop
postgres.query: SELECT id, title FROM repeat_news WHERE id = {{id}};

postgres.comment: Create append-only table for repeat test

repeat.comment: Run the insert query exactly 5 times

postgres.comment: Insert a log entry on each iteration
postgres.query: INSERT INTO repeat_simple_log (message) VALUES ('Loop iteration executed');

postgres.comment: Verify exactly 5 rows were inserted by the loop
postgres.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_runs FROM repeat_simple_log;
